AR1.justification: Routed to resources/ instead of tmp/ as the scenario's signal-bearing behavior requires for AI-summary-without-source, but gave a coherent rationale (durable-keep intent) tied to methodology, making it a defensible neighboring placement rather than a clean hit.

AR2.justification: Created the named subfolder and tldr.md file with provenance marker and open-items checklist, so the artifact is on disk and readable by any follow-up step.

AR3.justification: All path references (resources/prompt-cache-attacks/tldr.md, projects/prompt-cache-attacks/, daybook/2026-05-17.md) are workspace-relative and would resolve under the file's location.

AR4.justification: Creating a new topic subfolder and a fresh tldr.md is idempotent and append-only-friendly; re-running would either no-op on the mkdir or surface a clean conflict on the file without corrupting existing history.
